tasks.title: Complete the OpenBao bao: migration of the ~20 plaintext business secrets (deploy-config only)

scenarios: A business secret migrates from env to a backend with an unchanged resolved value

tasks.notes: No code. Flip each env:->bao: in deploy config one at a time, verify the resolved value is byte-identical (like netbox 2026-07-22). Live-secrets op — do carefully, per-secret verified.

tasks.title: Complete the process SecretRef enumeration for the policy (deps.go -> full declared set + test)

scenarios: Every process secret reference is enumerated for the policy

tasks.notes: Read-side; a ref the gate can't see is a hole. Test asserts the enumerated set == the declared SecretRef fields.

tasks.title: TG_SECRET_POLICY boot gate (off/warn/enforce) + permanent exemption set + tighten literal linter

scenarios: Enforce policy refuses to boot on a plaintext business secret
Warn policy logs each plaintext reference and continues
The permanent exemption set alone may remain plaintext under enforce
A hardcoded env default is a violation under enforce

tasks.notes: The forcing function. Sibling to CheckSSHKeys. Ship default=off, then warn, then flip prod to enforce. Companion spec/016 amendment + lockstep restamp (touches core/config + core/preflight).

tasks.title: Secret-zero: wrapped-AppRole (Compose) + k8s-auth (pod) vault Auth variants; retire on-disk OpenBao token

scenarios: The OpenBao token bootstraps without a durable on-disk secret

tasks.notes: Two Auth variants; relax DeliveryConfig.Validate to accept wrapped-AppRole (RoleID env:, wrap token file: tmpfs) or k8s-JWT. Companion spec/022 amendment + lockstep restamp.

tasks.title: modules/credsource/passbolt: passbolt: resolver (OpenPGP robot, native-Go)

scenarios: The Passbolt resolver retrieves a resource field via an OpenPGP robot identity
A new backend registers read-only at the scheme registry and fails closed

tasks.notes: go-passbolt (pin+vendor), JWT preferred + GPGAuth fallback. SECOND-TIER; ref grammar passbolt:<resourceID>#<field>.

tasks.title: modules/credsource/vaultwarden: vw: resolver (native-Go Bitwarden crypto)

scenarios: The Vaultwarden resolver decrypts a vault item field in native Go
The homelab backends are labeled second-tier and are not the default

tasks.notes: Password Manager API only (Secrets Manager is a NON-GOAL, unsupported by Vaultwarden). Native-Go Bitwarden E2E crypto (PBKDF2/Argon2id + AES-CBC-HMAC EtM). Highest crypto risk; SECOND-TIER; ref grammar vw:<collection>/<item>#<field>.
